title: Hadoop Data Processing Workflow
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequential steps of processing large datasets using the Hadoop ecosystem, from data ingestion to the final output.
relationships: Client submits data and job -> HDFS stores data across cluster
HDFS provides input -> MapReduce engine processes it
MapReduce engine distributes tasks -> Processing Nodes execute map and reduce functions
Processing Nodes write results -> Output Dataset stored in HDFS
